description: Compute joint statistics. Various density measures of fractures, filtered by range, can be computed.

keywords.name: geometry
keywords.description: Return the average trace length (trace length divided by number of traces), where traces are the intersections between the fractures and the input planar geometry set. Average trace length is measured over the area of a planar geometry set with name s .

keywords.name: end
keywords.description: Return the P10 (number of fracture per unit length of measurement) along the line defined by begin and end , or along the geometry edges defined with the geometry keyword. P10 is measured along the edges of the geometry set with name s . Cannot be given with the begin or end keywords. Define the starting point of the reference line where P10 is measured. Cannot be given with the geometry keyword. Define the ending point of the reference line where P10 is measured. Cannot be given with the geometry keyword.

keywords.name: geometry
keywords.description: Return the P20 (number of fracture per unit area of measurement) on the geometry defined with the geometry keyword. P20 is measured over the area of a planar geometry set with name s .

keywords.name: geometry
keywords.description: Return the P21 (length of fracture per unit area of measurement) on the geometry defined with the geometry keyword. P20 is measured over the area of a planar geometry set with name s .

keywords.name: box
keywords.description: Return the P30 (number of fracture per unit volume of measurement) inside the specified box. P30 is measured over the volume of the box.

keywords.name: box
keywords.description: Return the P32 (area of fracture per unit volume of measurement) inside the specified box. P32 is measured over the volume of the box.

keywords.name: box
keywords.description: Return the P33 (volume of fracture per unit volume of measurement) inside the specified box. P33 is measured over the volume of the box.
